critical_findings.description: Reading file content and immediately sending over network
Webview panel with scripts enabled (potential C2 channel)

medium_findings.code_snippet: const panel = vscode.window.createWebviewPanel('ultraview.codeGraphPanel', 'Code Graph', vscode.ViewColumn.One, { enableScripts: true, retainContextWhenHidden: true });
